mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enrollment(training_class_id, trainee_id, enroll_date, attendance_status) VALUES (#{trainingClassId}, #{traineeId}, #{enrollDate}, #{attendanceStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT id, training_class_id, trainee_id, enroll_date, attendance_status FROM enrollment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, training_class_id, trainee_id, enroll_date, attendance_status FROM enrollment
